role: CLI command adapters for ArchSpine operations.
responsibility: Provides the command-line interface entry points for all ArchSpine subcommands, handling argument parsing, validation, delegation to core services, and user feedback.

children.role: CLI command adapter for the 'build' operation, orchestrating the build workflow and delegating to core services.
CLI command adapter for the 'check' operation, providing the entry point that delegates to the RuntimeService's CheckService and signals failures via structured errors.
CLI command adapter for configuration management within the ArchSpine system.
CLI command adapter for the 'fix' operation, providing a thin interface to delegate execution to the runtime service's fix subsystem facade.
CLI command handler for the God Mode feature, providing user warnings and confirmation before delegating to the God engine.

CLI command adapter for the `spine history` subcommand, responsible for parsing arguments, delegating to the Manifest infrastructure for drift history and file documentation retrieval, and formatting the output for terminal display.
CLI command adapter for managing git hook integration and synchronization within the ArchSpine system.
CLI command handler for the 'info' command, acting as a thin adapter that orchestrates the execution of the info report engine.
CLI command orchestrator for initializing the ArchSpine environment, configuration, and repository structure.
CLI command adapter for interactive documentation language configuration management in the ArchSpine system.
CLI command adapter for interactive LLM provider, model, and runtime configuration.
CLI command adapter for starting the ArchSpine Model Context Protocol (MCP) server.
CLI command handler orchestrating the publish workflow for the ArchSpine mirror system, coordinating preflight checks, sync, document backfill, and atlas state management.
CLI command adapter for the 'remove' operation, orchestrating the cleanup of ArchSpine-managed artifacts from a repository.
CLI command router for repository-level operations in the ArchSpine system.
CLI command handler for the 'scan' operation, orchestrating source code scanning and dry-run reporting.
CLI command adapter for displaying the synchronization status of the ArchSpine mirror system.
CLI command adapter orchestrating the synchronization workflow for the ArchSpine mirror system.
CLI command adapter for the 'try' preview command, handling filesystem validation, configuration parsing, and user feedback.
CLI command entry point for executing usage reports.
CLI command adapter for the 'view' subcommand, handling view selection, validation, and orchestration of protected output writes within the ArchSpine system.
